headline: Biogen upgraded by UBS on ‘slew of pipeline catalysts’ going into 2027
summary: Biogen Inc (NASDAQ:BIIB, XETRA:IDP) has been upgraded to ‘Buy’ from ‘Neutral’ by UBS analysts, who also raised their price target to $225 from $185, citing growing confidence in a series of clinical and commercial catalysts expected over the next 12 to 15 months. Shares of Biogen traded hands...

headline: UBS Upgrades Biogen to Buy With a $225 Target: Are the Next 12 Months a Pipeline Catalyst Parade?
summary: Biogen (NASDAQ:BIIB) picked up a strong endorsement from Wall Street on Wednesday, as UBS analyst Michael Yee upgraded the stock to Buy from Neutral and raised his price target to $225 from $185. The call centers on a specific sequence of pipeline readouts Yee believes can move the stock meaningfully higher heading into 2027. This ... headline: UBS upgrades Biogen, sees up to 50% upside on pipeline catalysts
summary: Investing.com -- UBS analyst Michael Yee upgraded Biogen to Buy from Neutral and raised the price target to $225 from $185 in a note on Wednesday, citing a concentrated window of pipeline catalysts over the next 12 to 15 months that the firm believes the market has yet to fully price in.

headline: UBS Upgrades Biogen to Buy, Raises Price Target to $225
